segments.text: alright this is the monthly product review um agenda is pilot results renewals and the 2.4 release scope
I can start with the acme pilot the the extraction accuracy is at ninety four percent now up from eighty eight at kickoff
their PMs have basically stopped taking manual notes which was the the whole success criterion
that's great news anything blocking the conversion to paid
two things pricing on the renewal and their legal wants data residency language um they asked for a security review document too
tom can you own the security doc what's realistic
I'll commit to getting the security review document to acme by August first
on churn risk the one I'm watching is northwind forty eight thousand ARR renewal is September fifteenth and they've gone quiet
quiet how like no logins or no no replies
usage is down about forty percent since their champion left in May and my emails get one line replies
okay elena let's get proactive can you schedule QBRs with our top ten accounts northwind first
yes I'll schedule QBRs with the top ten accounts starting with northwind next week
raj where are we on the 2.4 release scope
so 2.4 is tracking for August twelfth um SSO is in good shape SAML works against okta and azure in staging
the usage dashboard is the risk the charting rework turned out bigger than estimated I I don't think both fit
enterprise deals need SSO more than dashboards so decision SSO ships in 2.4 and the usage dashboard slips to 2.5
agreed that de-risks the date significantly
sales is fine with that as long as SSO really lands on the twelfth I have three deals waiting on it
related ask um enterprise buyers keep asking about SCIM provisioning can I spend next sprint prototyping it
yes do it raj prototype SCIM next sprint and bring an estimate to the next review
quick metrics update NPS came in at forty one this quarter up from thirty six and support tickets are down twenty two percent
nice the the self serve help center is clearly paying off
one open question I keep getting what do we charge for the analytics add-on when it ships I've been making up placeholder numbers
yeah we haven't decided pricing for the analytics add-on um that needs a real session let's not settle it here
fine but soon please
recap then tom sends acme the security doc by August first elena runs QBRs top ten northwind first raj prototypes SCIM
and 2.4 ships August twelfth with SSO dashboard moves to 2.5 thanks everyone
thanks
bye all
